name: Escape2088
short_description: Escape2088 is an old-school escape room game set in a futuristic, cyberpunk world.
detailed_description:
More Escape Rooms

Craft potions ⚗️ and solve the riddles of your alchemy master, on Escape First Alchemist

Want more? Challenge your friends 👬 or escape together on Escape First

Take the role of a detective 🔎 trying to solve a mystery in Curious Cases


About the Game

Escape2088 is an old-school point & click escape room game with modern 3D graphics! Explore a futuristic environment and use your problem-solving skills to set yourself free!
Careful observation of the surroundings will help you discover hidden clues, solve logic puzzles and escape in time!

  • 3 different areas to explore
  • Optional time limitation
  • Multi-language support
  • Logic and observation puzzles
  • Unlockable achievements

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
